meaning: n.摩托车后座,妇女用马鞍,后部座位
examples: You must not carry a pillion passenger.
She rode pillion on her son's motor bike.
He drove his motorbike, with me riding pillion.
The authorities also banned people riding pillion on motorcycles and bicycles for one month.
Samantha Pillion, an incoming freshman at Wellesley College, agrees that Facebook friendships aren't necessarily built to last.
